LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS FRANCISCO MADERO AND ENRIQUE URRUTIA'S MOTION TO ENFORCE A WRITTEN SETTLEMENT AND TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS AGREE IN THEIR REPLY THAT THEY ARE ENTITLED TO A JUDGMENT FOR $106,532.33 PLUS SIMPLE INTEREST AT FIVE PERCENT (5%) PER YEAR ON THE OUTSTANDING PRINCIPAL COMMENCING FROM MAY 1, 2021 ($14.59/DAY FROM APRIL 30, 2021), FOR A TOTAL OF $108,371.11. PLAINTIFFS SHALL PREPARE SEPARATE ORDER AND JUDGMENT IN CONFORMANCE WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce A Written Settlement And To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 664.6; **Court Reporter Fees Paid**
Off Calendar Sep-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Martin Zurada, Esq. (510-832-4295; mzurada@vefirm.com) of Venardi Zurada LLP for Plaintiff.
David Phillips, Esq. (415-272-2240; davidalanphillips621@gmail.com) for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS FRANCISCO MADERO and ENRIQUE URRUTIA'S Motion To Enforce A Written Settlement And To Enter Judgment Pursuant To CCP 664.6:

Plaintiffs' motion to enforce settlement is granted. Plaintiffs agree in their reply that they are entitled to a judgment for $106,532.33 plus simple interest at five percent (5%) per year on the outstanding principal commencing from May 1, 2021 ($14.59/day from April 30, 2021), for a total of $108,371.11.

Plaintiffs shall prepare separate order and judgment in conformance with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MARTIN ZURADA, Esq. of Venardi Zurada LLP (Tel: 510-832-4295) for plaintiffs;
Atty. DAVID PHILLIPS, Esq. (Tel: 415-272-2240) for defendant Jose Eduardo Bonilla Castro.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS FRANCISCO MADERO and ENRIQUE URRUTIA's Motion To Enforce A Written Settlement And To Enter Judgment Pursuant To CCP 664.6.

Matter argued as to defendant's request for continuance. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and continues this matter to September 2, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Any opposition by defendant must be filed by August 24, 2021. Any reply by plaintiffs must by filed by August 30, 2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
